THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #411 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUL-12-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY 7/12/99 5:00 P.M. AMENDED JDGMT. FOR BACK RENT OF $245. AND U.D. DAMAGES OF $8.16 PER DAY FROM 5/15/99 TO 7/12/99 AND COST OF $171.00 SHALL BE GIVEN. SEC. DEP. FORFEITED TO PLTF. SEE JUDGMT. AT LENGTH.
C/C FOR SETTLMT. CONF. IN ROOM #302B. A. M. YOUNG, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLRK. ALL PARTIES PRESENT, EXCEPT PLTF M. AMIN AVAILABLE BY PHONE. CASE SETTLED. TERMS REPORTED.
